Title: Verify navigation to Settings Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on settings.
2. Verify if the settings page opens.
Expected Result: The settings page should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to New Location Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on display new location.
2. Verify if the new location page opens.
Expected Result: The new location page should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Location Details Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on a location.
2. Verify if the location details page opens.
Expected Result: The location details page should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on Pathfinder.
2. Verify if the Pathfinder page opens.
Expected Result: The Pathfinder page should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation back to Homepage via Swipe Up
Preconditions: User is on any page other than the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Swipe up.
2. Verify if the homepage opens.
Expected Result: The homepage should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to System Map
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on navigate.
2. Verify if the system map opens.
Expected Result: The system map should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Yelp Website
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on open in browser.
2. Verify if the Yelp website opens.
Expected Result: The Yelp website should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Call Business
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on call business.
2. Verify if the call initiates.
Expected Result: The call should initiate successfully.

Title: Verify navigation back to Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on back.
2. Verify if the homepage opens.
Expected Result: The homepage should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Preferences Modification
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on like/dislike.
2. Verify if the preferences modification screen opens.
Expected Result: The preferences modification screen should open successfully.

Title: Verify navigation back to Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on back.
2. Verify if the homepage opens.
Expected Result: The homepage should open successfully.

Title: Verify question display and response selection
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on back (no).
2. Verify if the question is displayed.
3. Select a response.
4. Verify if the suggested location is displayed.
Expected Result: The question should be displayed, and the suggested location should be displayed if available. If not, the process should end without further steps.

Title: Verify navigation back to Homepage without a suggestion
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on back (no).
2. Verify if the question is displayed.
3. Select a response.
4. Verify if there is no suggested location.
Expected Result: The question should be displayed, and the process should end without showing a suggested location. The homepage should not open.

Preconditions: User is on the homepage.

2. Verify if the settings page does not open.
Expected Result: The settings page should not open.

Title: Verify navigation to Settings Page with invalid input
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Data: Invalid input (e.g., clicking settings multiple times quickly).
Test Steps:
1. Click on settings multiple times quickly.
2. Verify if the settings page opens only once.
Expected Result: The settings page should open only once.
